Logan Lucky (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,778,642Details
International Box Office $21,267,479
Worldwide Box Office $49,046,121
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,041,368
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,554,911
Total $4,596,279
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Trying to reverse a family curse, brothers Jimmy and Clyde Logan set out to execute an elaborate robbery during the legendary Coca-Cola 600 race at the Charlotte Motor Speedway.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,600,036 (27.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$29,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,031 opening theaters/3,031 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $37,038,194

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 18th, 2017 (Wide) by Bleecker Street
International Releases: August 18th, 2017 (Wide) (Australia)
August 18th, 2017 (Wide) (New Zealand)
August 25th, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
August 25th, 2017 (Wide), released as Şanslı Logan (Turkey)
August 25th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: November 14th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language and some crude comments.
(Rating bulletin 2474 (Cert #51012), 5/3/2017)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Gratuitous Cameos
Geographical setting: North Carolina
Plot point: Auto Racing, Curses, Dysfunctional Family, Heist, NASCAR
Social setting: Crime Caper
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: FilmNation Entertainment, Trans-Radial Pictures, Free Association
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
